Baseline_DD_RIO.features_text:
- name: concept:name
  role: activity
  source: event
  dtype: string
  fill_na: <UNK>
  encoding:
  - embedding
- name: org:resource
  role: resource
  source: event
  dtype: string
  fill_na: UNKNOWN
  encoding:
  - embedding
- name: time:timestamp
  role: timestamp
  source: event
  dtype: timestamp
  fill_na: 0.0
  encoding:
  - z-score
  - time2vec_dayofweek
  - time2vec_hour
  - time2vec_work_hours
- name: duration
  source: event
  dtype: float
  fill_na: 0.0
  encoding:
  - z-score
- name: time_since_case_start
  source: event
  dtype: float
  fill_na: 0.0
  encoding:
  - z-score
- name: time_since_previous_event
  source: event
  dtype: float
  fill_na: 0.0
  encoding:
  - z-score
Baseline_DD_RIO.graph_mapping_text:
enabled: true
node_numeric:
- name: node_exec_count_v_all
  metric: exec_count
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_duration_median_v_all
  metric: duration_median
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_duration_p95_v_all
  metric: duration_p95
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_loop_density_v_all
  metric: loop_density
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_parallel_var_v_all
  metric: parallel_token_variance
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_freshness_v_all
  metric: freshness_score
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_confidence_v_all
  metric: confidence_score
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_exec_count_p_all
  metric: exec_count
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_duration_median_p_all
  metric: duration_median
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_duration_p95_p_all
  metric: duration_p95
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_loop_density_p_all
  metric: loop_density
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_parallel_var_p_all
  metric: parallel_token_variance
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_freshness_p_all
  metric: freshness_score
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
- name: node_confidence_p_all
  metric: confidence_score
  window: all_time
  scope: process
  default: 0.0
  encoding:
  - identity
edge_weight:
  metric: transition_probability
  window: all_time
  scope: version
  default: 1.0
  encoding:
  - identity
stats_quality_gate:
  enabled: true
  on_fail: allow_with_warning
  warn_on_fail: true
Baseline_DD_RIO.policies_text:
profile: mvp1_default
activity_fallback_feature: concept:name
zscore_clip:
  enabled: true
  min: -3.0
  max: 3.0
time2vec:
  work_hours:
    timezone: UTC
    working_days:
    - 0
    - 1
    - 2
    - 3
    - 4
    start_hour: 9
    end_hour: 18
